com.irurueta.units

Class AngularAccelerationConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.AngularAccelerationConverter

  • public class AngularAccelerationConverter
extends Object
    Does angular acceleration conversions to different units. To prevent loss of accuracy, conversion should only be done as a final step before displaying angular acceleration measurements.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AngularAccelerationConverter()
      Constructor.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static void convert(AngularAcceleration input, AngularAcceleration output)
      Converts an angular acceleration to provided output angular acceleration unit.
      static void convert(AngularAcceleration angularAcceleration, AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts and updates an angular acceleration to requested output unit.
      static void convert(AngularAcceleration input, AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit, AngularAcceleration result)
      Converts an angular acceleration to requested output unit.
      static double convert(double input, AngularAccelerationUnit inputUnit, AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an angular acceleration value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static Number convert(Number input, AngularAccelerationUnit inputUnit, AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an angle value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static AngularAcceleration convertAndReturnNew(AngularAcceleration input, AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an angular acceleration to requested output unit.
      static double degreesPerSquaredSecondToRadiansPerSquaredSecond(double degreesPerSquaredSecond)
      Converts provided degrees per squared second value to radians per squared second.
      static double radiansPerSquaredSecondToDegreesPerSquaredSecond(double radiansPerSquaredSecond)
      Converts provided radians per squared second value to degrees per squared second.

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • AngularAccelerationConverter

        AngularAccelerationConverter()
        Constructor. Prevents instantiation of helper class.

    • Method Detail

      • convert

        public static void convert(AngularAcceleration input,
                           AngularAcceleration output)
        Converts an angular acceleration to provided output angular acceleration unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input angular acceleration to be converted.
        output - output angular acceleration where result will be stored and containing output unit.

      • convertAndReturnNew

        public static AngularAcceleration convertAndReturnNew(AngularAcceleration input,
                                                      AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit)
        Converts an angular acceleration to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input angular acceleration to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unt.
        Returns:
        converted angular acceleration.

      • convert

        public static void convert(AngularAcceleration angularAcceleration,
                           AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit)
        Converts and updates an angular acceleration to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        angularAcceleration - input angular acceleration to be converted and updated.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.

      • convert

        public static void convert(AngularAcceleration input,
                           AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit,
                           AngularAcceleration result)
        Converts an angular acceleration to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input angular acceleration to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        result - angular acceleration instance where result will be stored.

      • convert

        public static Number convert(Number input,
                             AngularAccelerationUnit inputUnit,
                             AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit)
        Converts an angle value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - angular acceleration value.
        inputUnit - input angular acceleration unit.
        outputUnit - output angular acceleration unit.
        Returns:
        converted angular acceleration value.

      • convert

        public static double convert(double input,
                             AngularAccelerationUnit inputUnit,
                             AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit)
        Converts an angular acceleration value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - angualr acceleration value.
        inputUnit - input angular acceleration unit.
        outputUnit - output angular acceleration unit.
        Returns:
        converted angular acceleration value.

      • degreesPerSquaredSecondToRadiansPerSquaredSecond

        public static double degreesPerSquaredSecondToRadiansPerSquaredSecond(double degreesPerSquaredSecond)
        Converts provided degrees per squared second value to radians per squared second.
        Parameters:
        degreesPerSquaredSecond - degrees per squared second value.
        Returns:
        same angular acceleration converted to radians per squared second.

      • radiansPerSquaredSecondToDegreesPerSquaredSecond

        public static double radiansPerSquaredSecondToDegreesPerSquaredSecond(double radiansPerSquaredSecond)
        Converts provided radians per squared second value to degrees per squared second.
        Parameters:
        radiansPerSquaredSecond - radians per squared second value.
        Returns:
        same angualr acceleration converted to degrees per squared second.
